subcodes.title: Words to Myron Phelps and Madame Canavarro in Dec. 1902
subcodes.first_line: When I speak of health, I refer to spiritual health. The health of the body is impermanent. However carefully one seeks to preserve it
subcodes.subjects: @evolution; human evolution, @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @two kinds of knowledge [ilm and irfan]; sight and insight, @Manifestation of God as sun, @mission of the Manifestation of God in the world
